flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at NorthWest Arkansas Community College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.7k → $3.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at NorthWest Arkansas Community College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.5k → $5.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at NorthWest Arkansas Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at NorthWest Arkansas Community College fell 21% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.0k → $9.5k).
